purpose: Review examples and reply copy for L5.

reviews.text: The size was different from the chart and delivery took too long.
reviews.draftReply: Hi Anika, we are sorry the kurta set did not match your size expectation and arrived late. Please share your order details with us so we can arrange a quick replacement or return pickup. We are updating the size chart and delivery promise for this listing today.
Hi Riya, thank you for the kind words. We are glad the fabric and packing experience worked well for you.
